titleStmt.title: SII 24.54: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 54. (A.R. No. 118 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of land in Kaṟkuḍi by Sēnāpati Vīrarājēndra Adigaimāṉ for a flower garden to the temple. The record is dated in the 13th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavum tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri ṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tan=taḷam miriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porparinaṭāt
tik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit teṉticaittemarukamalappū pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum naṉnilappāvaiyun taniṉa makuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu pe varuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella
veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiru niḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattu corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻaiye
nnuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetirkoṭā vikkalan kala naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenattuṅkapattirai yaḷavu veṅkaṇum paṭṭaveṅ kaḷirum viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟiṉana vīramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta netikaḷuñ cūḻnṟūṭaintoṭak kuṭaticai tannāṭukañca tā
ntāṉaiyum pannā tukum payante ntiruvum celviyum vāḷāviṭa ṭamum miḷātu ṅkiri niṟaivuṅ kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇavennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaikkaikko ṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷ
Damaged. ttu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum y vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñceṉaiyai Evip pañcavarai varum Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacarar tiriyum
maṟṟik koṟṟa vijaiyastampam ticaitoṟu niṟu tti mutti pātiyilu mattaveṅkaripaṭumaiyyac caiyyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭal llām tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivaraik kurukalar kuraiyak koṭṭā
ṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟal koḷ ntiriyavi yāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum poliya viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari panmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅ
śrī m ceykiṟa naṭuvirukkum karippuṟattu A ṇapaṭṭarkku patinmunṟāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu muppattonṟināl tirumukam piraśātam ceytaruḷi vanta(p) paṭi . virarājentra Ati �ntiru tāḻvār ko viṟṟa tirunan=tavāṉattukku tiruttivitta nilam kalveṭṭuvittukkuṭukka venṟu tirumantraōlai virā
Eḻuttināl pirasātam ceytaruḷiṉamaiyil naṭu m karippuṟattu Anan=tanārāyaṇa paṭṭar Evalpaṭi śrī vayiṣṇavavāriya vil periyakoyil dāsar Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟuvarum śrī paṇṭā m Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān [�kavan] Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟuvarum kaṇkāṇiyākavum śrīvaiyiṣṇavakkaṇakku vempan Uṭaiyān Āna Aḻakiya
kalluveṭṭuppaṭi coḻamaṇṭalattu vi vallattu vallamuṭaiyān veṇkāṭan cey mān senāpati virarājentra Atiyamān ceyvikkiṟa tiru rāmanukku Ivan maṇavāṭṭi Ātittan ku menkai ceyvikkiṟa tirunanta
vanam ku rān=taka vaḷanāṭṭu vi nāṭṭu kaṟkuṭiyil maṇaliṭ Uṇṇāte nāppatu samvatsaram payir ceyya y kiṭan=ta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai karikālacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattukku nir pāykiṟa kālukku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai
irājentra ṭṭālāṭṭuvitta maṇṇilaikku viṭa l pāṟkellai Araiyan vi coḻabrahmārāyar Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai rājentracoḻan vākkālukku teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Iru veliyum viḷākamennu piyarināl tirutti
veṇṭu payir ceytu koṇṭu vi puncaivaricai veli O n marakkālā Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum In nellup pokki su yipokat ḷḷonṟukku nel nittam kuṟuṇi
ḻiy kku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu tūṇippatakkum puṭavai mutala(k)āka Eṭṭu ceyvāri Iruvaṟkku nā(ḷ)ḷonṟukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum Āṭ lu kācum koṇṭu It tevarkum
Ira ku veṭṭi muṭṭai kaṭavatallavāka kulaiyum cennir nir� ntrātittaval nikkak kaṭavitākavum Aṭuttukkuṭuttom sa ceyya pātamāna senāpati kāri
kkaṇakku ve yān Āṟṟū yan ṉ Eḻuttu . tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 24.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
